title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
